user.title: Connect Fraimic frame
user.description: Enter the frame's IP address (recommended -- see why below), or leave this blank to scan your network for frames. A hostname like fraimic.local also still works, but won't automatically track IP changes the way a discovered or IP-based entry does, and is ambiguous if you have more than one frame.

pick_device.title: Select a frame
pick_device.description: These frames were found on your network.

dhcp_confirm.title: Fraimic frame discovered
dhcp_confirm.description: A Fraimic {model} frame was found at {ip}. Add it to Home Assistant?

reconfigure.title: Change Fraimic address
reconfigure.description: Update the frame's address. An IP address is recommended; fraimic.local (or another hostname) still works but won't get automatic IP-change tracking.

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't connect. Check that the frame is awake and connected.

abort.wrong_device: This is a different physical frame than the one you're reconfiguring.
abort.not_fraimic_device: The device found on your network doesn't look like a Fraimic frame.

invalid_image_size.message: File is not the correct size for this panel's resolution.

file_too_large.message: File is larger than the frame's 1 MB limit.

unsupported_content_type.message: The frame only accepts .bin files, not JPEG/PNG.

buffer_not_ready.message: Frame is still busy (e.g. mid-refresh). Try again shortly.

charging_cable_connected.message: Can't sleep: a charging cable is plugged into the frame.

path_not_allowed.message: Path {path} is not in Home Assistant's allowlist_external_dirs.

already_busy.message: Still processing the previous image, wait a moment and try again.

entity_not_found.message: {entity_id} is not a Fraimic albums sensor.

albums_sync_failing.title: Album sync has been failing
albums_sync_failing.description: The frame at {host} has been awake and reachable, but syncing albums from Fraimic's cloud has kept failing regardless. This isn't the frame's normal sleep behavior -- check that the frame has internet access (not just a connection to your local network), and that app.fraimic.com is reachable.

send_image.name: Send image
send_image.description: Sends a local image file to the frame, converting it to the Spectra 6 format first. Runs in the background and waits up to 10 minutes for the frame to wake if it's asleep.

path.name: Path
path.description: Path to the image file, e.g. /config/www/fraimic/photo.jpg. Must be in an allowed directory.

fit.name: Fit
fit.description: fit shows the whole image with black padding; fill crops to fill the frame.

dither.name: Dithering
dither.description: Dithering algorithm for the 6-color conversion. atkinson matches the original Fraimic tool; floyd_steinberg is a fast, common default. Use dry run to preview a mode before committing to it.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Converts and previews the image without uploading it to the frame.

update_album.name: Update album
update_album.description: Updates an existing album (find its ID via the Albums sensor's attributes). Only the fields you set are changed -- everything else on the album is left alone. Requires the frame to have internet access, since albums live on app.fraimic.com, not the frame itself.

album_id.name: Album ID
album_id.description: The album's id, from the Albums sensor's attributes.

playback_mode.name: Playback Mode
playback_mode.description: Choose how images cycle through the album.

schedule_type.name: Image Rotation Schedule
schedule_type.description: How often should images change? Replaces the album's entire schedule -- always send the matching fields below for whichever type you choose.

interval_value.name: Interval value
interval_value.description: Used with Image Rotation Schedule: Every X Time, e.g. 24.

interval_unit.name: Interval unit
interval_unit.description: Used with Image Rotation Schedule: Every X Time -- minutes, hours, or days.

days.name: Select Days
days.description: Used with Image Rotation Schedule: Specific Days -- a list of weekdays, e.g. monday, wednesday.

init.title: Display defaults
init.description: Used when picking images from the media browser. The send_image service can override fit/dither per call; device orientation always comes from here.
